2381270.name: Stickman and the sword of legends
2381270.description:
Stickman needs to get the Sword of Legends to be able to leave his planet that is about to explode.You need to collect 3 boxes to pass each level , you can walk with WASD jump with space attack with the mouse and dash with Q , you can also change the camera angle with TAB.You can play 4 different levels , but they are not in their final form, some of them just close the game others are connected .
This game was first released in itch.io as a collage project in the university(FUMEC) and this version was made for the School of Public Management, Communication and Tourism to obtain a Bachelor degree in Game Design.
The itch,io version was completely created by me Felipe Ananias aka derefepo and the steam version was made with the help of some friends , that were responsable for the 2D art and the Steam art.
2381270.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
